## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] I've added/updated i18n keys for both `en.json` and `ja.json` if any UI strings changed
- [ ] I've updated `README.md` / `README.ja.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I've kept the PR to a single concern (refactor-only, feature-only, fix-only)
- [ ] I've tested the change in a browser, not just via `tsc`
